domainHand.notes: Domain / anti-domain / domain-maintenance cards use independent control slots and do not count toward the normal 8-card hand limit.

notes: 1.399 hand prototype: normal hand candidates persist lightly across turns. Unplayed normal cards remain, each turn draws 5 new normal candidates, and overflow is discarded from remaining + new cards until hand size is <= 8. Domain control cards are now separated into an independent 3-slot domain hand that refreshes each round and does not count toward the 8-card normal hand limit. Manual discard choice UI is not yet implemented.
